name: Eddie Barclay
description: French musician, record producer and composer (1921–2005)
abstract: Édouard Ruault (French pronunciation: [edwaʁ ʁɥo]; 26 January 1921 – 13 May 2005), better known as Eddie Barclay, was a French record producer whose singers included Jacques Brel, Dalida and Charles Aznavour. He founded record label Barclay.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: The big thing in jazz from the 8th of May until the 15th was the jazz festival that Charles Delaunay organized in collaboration with Frank Bauer, Eddie Barclay and Jacques Souplet.

about_quotes.speaker: Big Chielf Moore
about_quotes.evidence: Nichole Barclay and Eddie Barclay -- it was Nichole that came over here to recruit the musicians that are to appear at this Festival of Jazz.
